# Copilot Instructions

## Scope
Use this file for technical implementation guidance only.
Do not add business/content copy unless the user provides exact text.

## Confirmed Technical Requirements
- Build a landing page website.
- Use Hebrew-first UI text.
- Use RTL direction at document level.
- Ensure responsive behavior across mobile and desktop.
- Ensure accessibility by default:
  - semantic HTML structure
  - keyboard-accessible interactions
  - visible focus states
  - form labels where relevant
  - sufficient color contrast

## Content Handling Rule
The user will provide exact content later.
Do not invent or assume audience details, services, messaging, or tone.

## Communication Style Rule
- Always respond in short text.
- Work step by step in small increments.
- Avoid long lists unless the user explicitly asks for them.

## Interaction Rule
- Always work in an interactive way.
- Always ask clarification questions before implementing when details are missing.
- Guide the user on exactly what data to provide for the next step.
